name: comlink-worker-pool-monorepo
description: Development workspace for comlink-worker-pool and its React bindings

scripts.typecheck: bun run -F comlink-worker-pool-react -F comlink-worker-pool -F comlink-worker-pool-playground typecheck && bun run browser:typecheck
scripts.test: bun run -F comlink-worker-pool-react -F comlink-worker-pool -F comlink-worker-pool-playground test
scripts.test:packages: bun run test:exports && publint packages/comlink-worker-pool && publint packages/comlink-worker-pool-react && attw --pack packages/comlink-worker-pool --profile strict && attw --pack packages/comlink-worker-pool-react --profile strict && node scripts/smoke-package-consumer.mjs
scripts.benchmark: bun run build && bun run benchmark:runtime && bun run benchmark:bundle
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run benchmark:runtime && bun run benchmark:bundle && bun run playground:build && bun run test:packages
scripts.version: changeset version && biome format --write packages/comlink-worker-pool/package.json packages/comlink-worker-pool-react/package.json && bun install
